subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who, through His generosity and grace, hath bestowed upon us the gift of divine recognition and hath sent down from the clouds of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انعم علینا بجوده و فضله نعمه العرفان و انزل من سحاب کرمه
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @work as worship, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consultation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
